Custom Business Magnets for Vehicle & Commercial Use

Durable 30 Mil Magnetic Material - Order Custom Business Magnets

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Select magnet size and finishing options for your custom business magnets. Choose from rounded corners for optimal vehicle performance or square cut for standard applications. PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Business Magnets for Professional Vehicle & Marketing Display

Professional-grade business magnets designed for vehicle advertising, trade shows, and commercial applications. Our custom business magnets feature durable 30 mil magnetic material with full-color printing and protective lamination for long-lasting outdoor performance.

Perfect for contractors, real estate professionals, service businesses, and promotional campaigns. These business magnets provide removable advertising that adheres securely to magnetic surfaces while maintaining professional appearance.

Business Magnet Features

  • 30 mil magnetic material for strong adhesion
  • Full-color digital printing included
  • Protective lamination for weather resistance
  • Maximum print size: 24" x 24"
  • Rounded corners recommended for vehicle use
  • Removable and repositionable

Important: Before purchasing magnets, ensure the intended surface is magnetic receptive. Magnets won't stick to aluminum or plastic vehicle body panels.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

30 Mil Business Magnet Material for Vehicle Applications

Our business magnets are manufactured using premium 30 mil magnetic material, providing the optimal balance of flexibility and holding power for professional vehicle and commercial applications.

Magnetic Material Specifications

  • 30 mil thickness: Professional-grade magnetic strength
  • Flexible material: Conforms to curved vehicle surfaces
  • Weather-resistant: Suitable for outdoor commercial use
  • Laminated finish: Protects against UV rays and moisture
  • Full-color printing: Vibrant graphics and text reproduction

Surface Compatibility

Business magnets adhere to ferrous (magnetic) metal surfaces including:

  • Steel vehicle doors and panels
  • Refrigerators and appliances
  • Metal filing cabinets
  • Steel building surfaces

Note: Magnets will not adhere to aluminum, plastic, fiberglass, or non-magnetic surfaces. Test surface compatibility before ordering if uncertain.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Magnet Finishing Options for Professional Display

Choose the appropriate finishing option based on your intended use and application requirements. Each finishing option is designed to optimize performance and appearance.

Rounded Corners (Recommended for Vehicles)

  • Reduces wind resistance during driving
  • Prevents corners from lifting at highway speeds
  • Professional appearance with smooth edges
  • Standard option for vehicle applications

Square Cut

  • Clean, sharp corners for indoor applications
  • Maximum print area utilization
  • Ideal for stationary display uses
  • Professional appearance for trade shows

Custom Contour Cut

  • Cut to match specific shapes or logos
  • Unique branded appearance
  • Enhanced visual impact
  • Custom consultation available

For vehicle applications, rounded corners are strongly recommended to ensure secure adhesion during driving and prevent wind-related lifting.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Business Magnet Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production time ranges from one to five business days, allowing you to control your project timeline and budget. All production times begin after artwork approval and file upload completion.

1 Business Day Priority

  • Fastest turnaround for urgent projects
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process next business day
  • Same-day rush available in select cases
  • Premium pricing for expedited service

2 Business Days Express

  • Quick turnaround with cost savings
  • Ideal for time-sensitive promotional campaigns
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process next business day
  • Popular choice for trade show preparation

3 Business Days Standard

  • Most popular production option
  • Excellent balance of speed and value
  • Free production option
  • Recommended for most business applications

5 Business Days Saver

  • Maximum cost savings for non-urgent orders
  • Perfect for planned marketing campaigns
  • Lowest pricing tier available
  • Ideal for large quantity orders

Important: Production time excludes shipping time. If proofs are requested, production begins after approval. Emergency rush service available - contact customer service for availability.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Magnet Payment & Ordering Options

All custom business magnets must be paid before production begins. We offer multiple convenient payment methods to accommodate your business needs.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Business Checks: Must be received before production starts
  • Purchase Orders: Available for qualified business accounts

Payment Processing

  • Credit cards are charged only after order approval
  • Secure payment processing for all transactions
  • Business account terms available for qualifying customers
  • Check orders require payment clearance before production

Order Approval Process

Your payment will not be processed until you have reviewed and approved your order details, including:

  • Artwork and design specifications
  • Size and finishing options
  • Production timeline selection
  • Shipping address confirmation

For check payment information and processing requirements, please contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Business Magnet Delivery

We provide reliable shipping nationwide with tracking and insurance coverage. Standard shipping is UPS Ground with 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the United States.

Standard Shipping Service

  • UPS Ground: 1-3 business days to most locations
  • Tracking included: Monitor your shipment progress
  • Insurance coverage: Protection against damage or loss
  • Weight-based pricing: Cost determined by package weight and destination

Expedited Shipping Options

  • Next Day Air for urgent deliveries
  • 2-Day Air for faster delivery
  • Saturday delivery available
  • Express shipping to rural areas

Large Order Considerations

  • Additional charges apply to oversized packages
  • Freight shipping available for bulk orders
  • Commercial delivery options
  • Special handling for large format magnets

Shipping Protection

All shipments include:

  • Protective packaging for magnet materials
  • Damage replacement guarantee
  • Lost package replacement after investigation
  • Tracking number provided upon shipment

Note: Shipping delays due to weather, natural disasters, or carrier issues beyond our control do not qualify for shipping refunds. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 with shipping questions.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional & Marketing Uses for Business Magnets

Custom business magnets provide versatile marketing solutions for numerous industries and applications. Their removable nature makes them ideal for temporary and permanent advertising needs.

Vehicle Advertising

  • Service Vehicles: HVAC, plumbing, electrical contractors
  • Delivery Fleets: Food delivery, courier services
  • Real Estate: Agent contact information and branding
  • Sales Teams: Removable advertising for personal vehicles

Commercial Applications

  • Trade Shows: Booth displays and promotional giveaways
  • Retail Stores: Refrigerator and appliance advertising
  • Office Buildings: Directory and wayfinding signage
  • Restaurants: Menu displays and promotional offers

Professional Services

  • Healthcare: Appointment reminders and contact information
  • Insurance Agents: Client contact and service reminders
  • Home Services: Lawn care, cleaning, maintenance companies
  • Education: School events and fundraising campaigns

Promotional Marketing

  • Customer giveaways and loyalty programs
  • Event sponsorship and brand awareness
  • Seasonal promotions and special offers
  • Contact information and service reminders

Business magnets work best on steel surfaces and provide excellent visibility for brand recognition and contact information display.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Magnet Artwork Requirements for Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality and professional results for your custom business magnets. Our prepress team reviews all files before production.

Preferred File Formats

  • Vector Files: .EPS, .AI (fonts converted to outlines)
  • High-Resolution PDF: 300 DPI minimum, CMYK color mode
  • High-Resolution Images: .JPG, .PNG at 300 DPI
  • Native Files: .PSD, .INDD with linked images

Design Specifications

  • Resolution: 300 DPI for sharp, clear printing
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed Area: 0.125" bleed beyond finished size
  • Safe Zone: Keep critical text 0.25" from edges

Artwork Review Services

  • Professional Design Review: Our graphic designers check file quality
  • Order Proofs Available: Review design before production approval
  • Color Match Proofs: For color-critical projects requiring exact matching
  • Design Assistance: Professional help with file preparation

Proof Options

Order Proof: Includes low-resolution artwork preview, order summary, pricing, and shipping details. Production holds until you approve.

Color Match Proof: Physical proof for color-critical projects. Recommended for brand matching and corporate identity applications.

Unsure about your file quality? Our professional graphic design team will review your artwork and provide assistance to ensure optimal printing results.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Business Magnets for Professional Marketing

Ready to create professional business magnets that promote your brand and drive customer engagement? Our custom business magnets combine durable materials, full-color printing, and flexible production options to meet your marketing needs.

Why Choose Our Business Magnets?

  • Professional Quality: 30 mil magnetic material with protective lamination
  • Full-Color Printing: Vibrant graphics and crisp text reproduction
  • Flexible Production: 1-5 day turnaround options to fit your timeline
  • Expert Support: Professional design assistance and order guidance
  • Nationwide Shipping: Fast, reliable delivery with tracking

Perfect for Your Business

Whether you're a contractor needing vehicle signage, a real estate agent promoting listings, or a business owner expanding brand visibility, our custom business magnets provide cost-effective, removable advertising that works.

Upload your artwork or work with our design team to create professional business magnets that represent your brand with quality and durability.

Questions about your project? Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for personalized assistance with sizing, materials, or artwork requirements.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Magnet FAQ

What material are your business magnets made from?

Our business magnets are made from 30 mil magnetic material with protective lamination. This thickness provides excellent holding power while remaining flexible enough to conform to vehicle surfaces and curved applications.

Can I upload my own artwork for custom business magnets?

Yes, you can upload your own artwork files. We accept vector files (.EPS, .AI), high-resolution PDFs, and image files (.JPG, .PNG) at 300 DPI. Our prepress team reviews all artwork to ensure optimal print quality before production.

What cut options are available for custom business magnets?

We offer three cut options: rounded corners (recommended for vehicles), square cut (standard applications), and custom contour cut (shaped to your design). Rounded corners help prevent wind lift during vehicle use.

Can my business magnet be cut to the shape of my logo or design?

Yes, we offer custom contour cutting to match your logo or design shape. This creates a unique appearance and enhanced visual impact. Contact our customer service team to discuss your specific contour cutting requirements.

What surfaces do business magnets stick to best?

Business magnets adhere to ferrous (magnetic) metal surfaces including steel vehicle doors, refrigerators, filing cabinets, and steel building surfaces. They will not stick to aluminum, plastic, fiberglass, or non-magnetic materials.

What are business magnets commonly used for?

Business magnets are popular for vehicle advertising, trade show displays, refrigerator marketing, office signage, and promotional giveaways. They're ideal for contractors, real estate agents, delivery services, and any business needing removable advertising.

Can I write on a business magnet?

Our business magnets have a laminated surface that is not designed for writing. For the best appearance and durability, we recommend including all text and graphics in your printed design rather than adding handwritten information.

How long do custom business magnets last?

With proper care and application, business magnets can last several years outdoors. The laminated surface protects against UV rays and moisture. Lifespan depends on environmental conditions, surface preparation, and usage frequency.
